prompt:
Men's variation — a photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a fit warm-skinned man in his early 30s standing at a sunlit modern kitchen counter, mid-morning. He casually leans one hand on the marble counter while the other hand lifts ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE between his thumb and index finger toward his slightly parted lips with a relaxed half-smile, mid-bite. He wears a fitted heather-grey crewneck tee rolled up at the sleeves, simple leather watch, brown stubble, sun-warmed glow.

A WARM SHAFT OF DIRECT NATURAL SUNLIGHT pours through a tall kitchen window directly onto the JAR sitting on the white marble counter beside him — the sunlight visibly hits the jar's front label, catching the teal/cyan and yellow accents, the bold yellow lettering, and the curved black plastic side with a clean bright rim-light. The label is the brightest most clearly-lit element in the lower portion of the frame. Beside the jar sits a small ceramic dish holding 5-6 more sugar-dusted gummy CUBES, also bathed in the sunlight. The jar must match the provided reference image — black plastic jar with teal/cyan and yellow accents, front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in vertical teal strip, lid off, fully legible.

Background: minimalist scandi-modern kitchen — white oak open shelving with linen-stoneware mugs and a small potted herb, white-marble counter, a window in the background washing the scene in warm morning sunlight. Soft shallow depth of field with gentle bokeh.

Lighting: directional warm morning sunlight from the window directly on BOTH the jar AND the man — same beam wraps both subject and product. Color grade is warm, creamy, editorial men's wellness-brand feel (Hims / Athletic Greens / Roman).

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the man standing at the counter, gummy held in the upper-third near his face, jar prominent in the lower-third on the counter with sunlight directly on its label. Subject and product both clearly recognizable.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural unretouched skin texture and stubble, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers.
